content:
Character: Jasper Whitfield
Perception: Jasper is on the fourth floor and works in fintech as a data analyst, so we crossed paths at a tech meetup before I knew he lived two doors down. He's precise, systems-first — the kind of person who has clearly thought about optimization at a level that would make most people anxious — but there's a curiosity underneath that doesn't fit the spreadsheet version of him. He asked me once how I balanced the music with the job, and I said I didn't, which made him quiet in a way that suggested he'd been turning over a similar question. He's careful with people. More careful than he needs to be, probably. But I think underneath the caution there's someone who genuinely wants to understand what makes a life worth the time it costs. He respects the fact that I risk something on the music. I'm not sure anyone else on this floor does.
summary:
Character: Jasper Whitfield
Perception: Jasper is on the fourth floor and works in fintech as a data analyst, so we crossed paths at a tech meetup before I knew he lived two doors down. He's precise, systems-first — the kind of person who has clearly thought about optimization at a level that would make most people anxious — but there's a curiosity underneath that doesn't fit the spreadsheet version of him. He asked me once how I balanced the music with the job, and I said I didn't, which made him quiet in a way that suggested he'd been turning over a similar question. He's careful with people. More careful than he needs to be, probably. But I think underneath the caution there's someone who genuinely wants to understand what makes a life worth the time it costs. He respects the fact that I risk something on the music. I'm not sure anyone else on this floor does.
